sentence_reviews.text: The model learns gradients of log density, often from noise-corrupted data.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML, score matching/denoising score material; Ho et al. DDPM paper, denoising diffusion training with noise-corrupted data.
sentence_reviews.notes: The gradient-of-log-density and denoising/corruption pieces are supported across sources, but the exact sentence combines them.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Score matching & denoising score objectives is to connect Generative modeling, Probability theory to downstream capabilities including Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption, Diffusion & score-based models.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML score/probabilistic modeling material; Ho et al. DDPM abstract and method on diffusion probabilistic models and denoising objectives.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited sources support probability/generative links and diffusion/denoising downstream use; graph-role wording is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Ho et al. DDPM paper on forward noising and learned denoising reverse process; Murphy PML score/denoising material.
sentence_reviews.notes: The denoising/noise-corruption objective is directly supported.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Ho et al. DDPM paper on diffusion probabilistic models; Murphy PML score-based generative modeling material.
sentence_reviews.notes: Diffusion support is direct; the broader score-based model label is supported by synthesis with PML.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Probability theory.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML score/probabilistic modeling material; Ho et al. DDPM training objective and variational-bound discussion.
sentence_reviews.notes: The dependencies are supported, but the generic objective-mismatch limitation is not directly stated in the cited sources.

sentence_reviews.text: Score matching & denoising score objectives uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML score-based generative modeling material; Ho et al. DDPM as a generative diffusion model.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited sources directly place these objectives in generative modeling.

sentence_reviews.text: Score matching & denoising score objectives uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML on log density scores; Ho et al. DDPM on diffusion probabilistic models.
sentence_reviews.notes: Log density gradients and diffusion probabilistic models directly support the probability dependency.

sentence_reviews.text: Score matching & denoising score objectives uses Calculus & automatic differentiation theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Murphy PML score matching material, where the score is the gradient of log density.
sentence_reviews.notes: Gradients directly imply calculus, but automatic differentiation is not directly evidenced by the packet source.

edge_reviews.notes: Score/denoising objectives are used for generative diffusion models; core strength is supported.
Scores are gradients of log densities and DDPMs are probabilistic models; core strength is supported.
